Consumer Products Case

Low-Volume Internal Bracket Trial for a Small Appliance

internal bracket / assembly support / small-batch trial

IndustriesConsumer Products
Part Functioninternal bracket / assembly support / small-batch trial
Manufacturing CapabilitiesCNC machining or sheet metal processing, hole control, deburring and batch inspection

Project Scenario

The small appliance bracket needed quick low-volume parts for internal layout and assembly verification.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The trial batch helped confirm bracket position, installation clearance and later tooling direction.
